description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The exterior features a mix of white and brown wall finishes, large glass windows, and a prominent front porch area. The property includes a driveway with a purple car, a backyard with a swimming pool, and a detached treehouse built into a large tree, complete with a ladder and swing set. The house has multiple entry points, including a main entrance with steps and a covered porch, as well as sliding glass doors leading to the backyard. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows providing ample natural light. The surrounding yard is landscaped with grass, trees, and a small shed or utility structure.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, treehouse, and driveway. The exterior combines white and brown finishes with open, airy spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a purple car, front porch, and backyard pool with treehouse and swing set visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side yard, utility shed, and the treehouse with ladder and swing set.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, treehouse, and asymmetrical window arrangement along the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, treehouse, utility shed, and the open layout of the house interior.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, covered porch, and a modern door flanked by large windows
